name: Vassar Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, coarsely chopped chocolate, and cream in a saucepan.
2. Cook over moderate heat, stirring until the sugar and chocolate have melted.
3. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches 238°F or forms a soft ball when tested with cold water.
4. Remove from heat, add butter, and let cool slightly.
5. Beat until fudge begins to harden, then transfer to a buttered platter.
6. Allow to set completely before cutting into squares. This recipe makes more than 1 pound of fudge.
7. Variations: To make Wellesley Fudge, add ½ lb marshmallows when the candy is removed from heat.
